context: Evaluates implementation of .clangd YAML suppression parsing and merging. The candidate must correctly traverse the YAML structure to find Diagnostics.Suppress entries and merge them with extension-provided suppressions without duplication.

checklist.name: Correct YAML section navigation
checklist.description: parseClangdSuppressions correctly identifies the Diagnostics: section, then the Suppress: subsection, and extracts only items from that subsection (stops at ClangTidy: key)

checklist.name: Missing file handling
checklist.description: Returns an empty array (not an error) when the .clangd file does not exist (ENOENT); propagates other filesystem errors

checklist.name: Comment line exclusion
checklist.description: Lines beginning with '# ' inside the Suppress block are excluded from the returned suppressions list

checklist.name: Merge preserves order
checklist.description: mergeClangdSuppressions returns extension suppressions first, then appends user suppressions not already in the base list, preserving relative order

checklist.name: Merge no duplicates
checklist.description: mergeClangdSuppressions does not include a suppression from existingSuppressions that is already present in newSuppressions
